title: Kontraption
description: A Mekanism addon focused on adding airships and various other oddities.
body:
Text version

Kontraption

What is Kontraption? Kontraption is a Mekanism content addon focusing on adding various oddities (such as airships (that are fully interactable) ) to the game!

Kontraption currently adds: Multiblock Hydrogen Thrusters, Ion Thrusters, Gyroscope, Ship Control Interface, Toolgun (for ship assembly), CC Support, And more in the future!

This mod is IN DEVELOPMENT, there will be GAME BREAKING BUGS. Please report any bugs you find in the GitHub!

![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8defd12e6aa3f7b564402f526312d4e0eef1770e.png) ![What is Kontraption?
